DESTRUCTION_EYE_RELIC.title: Destructive Impulse
DESTRUCTION_EYE_RELIC.description: Once each turn, when you kill an enemy, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your next turn.
DESTRUCTION_EYE_RELIC.flavor: With every destruction, her heartbeat quickens.
